title: toxicodendron griffithii var. barbatum
intro: Toxicodendron griffithii var. barbatum is a variety of the poisonous plant, Poison Sumac, known for its white or pale yellow berries and leaves with a reddish tint. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Toxicodendron griffithii var. barbatum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use in treating infections and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or salves, but due to its highly toxic nature, it is crucial to exercise extreme caution when handling and preparing the plant.
